name: agent-tool-call
title: AgentToolCall
description: Display-only disclosure for an agent tool call, its safe input or output, and execution status.

intent.summary: Display-only disclosure for an agent tool call, its safe input or output, and execution status.
useWhen: A prototype or agent product needs to expose user-safe tool execution detail.
avoidWhen: A participant must approve, deny, edit, or retry the tool call; those are product controls outside this component.
accessibility: Queued, running, success, error, and denied states are available as text.
The disclosure uses native keyboard and expanded-state semantics.
states: This component presents state but never executes a tool or owns approval policy.
responsiveBehavior: Structured detail wraps and scrolls without widening the transcript.

consumption.complexPropertyNote: Assign these non-primitive values as JavaScript properties: input, output.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
